title: lepidium hirtum subsp. calycotrichum
intro: Lepidium hirtum subsp. calycotrichum, commonly known as Calycotrichia or 'Wild Cress', is a plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lepidium hirtum subsp. calycotrichum include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic agent. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
